title: Turritis retrofracta
intro: Turritis retrofracta, also known as the hooked rocket, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Turritis retrofracta include isothiocyanates, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Turritis retrofracta is commonly used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to create remedies for respiratory and immune system support.
